plugins.name: conversiontools
plugins.description: Convert files between 140+ formats using the ConversionTools MCP server. Supports documents, data formats (incl. Parquet), images (incl. JXL), audio, video, e-books, OCR, AI extraction, text-to-speech (TTS), speech-to-text (STT), subtitles (SRT, VTT, ASS), and website screenshots.
